questions.question_text: The passage describes the ecological 'significance' of coral reefs for marine life and human livelihoods. What does 'significance' mean?

options.text: The physical size or geographical location of a natural feature
The importance and meaningful value that something holds
The number of species found within a particular ecosystem
The financial cost required to study or protect something

questions.explanation_ar: significance تعني الأهمية والمغزى، أي القيمة المعنوية أو العلمية الكبيرة التي يمتلكها شيء ما.

questions.question_text: Coral reefs protect coastlines by 'absorbing' wave energy during storms. What does 'absorbing' mean in this context?

options.text: Reflecting and directing wave energy away from coastal areas
Increasing the speed and force of waves near the shore
Taking in and reducing wave energy to lessen its impact
Storing wave energy underground for use in future emergencies

questions.explanation_ar: absorbing تعني يمتص، أي أخذ الطاقة أو المادة وتقليل تأثيرها عن طريق استيعابها داخل هيكل أو جسم ما.

questions.question_text: Dr. Al-Rashid carefully 'descends' toward the coral reef with her camera ready. What does 'descends' mean?

options.text: Moves downward to a lower level or depth
Swims rapidly across the surface of open water
Rises steadily toward the water surface from below
Turns sharply to avoid obstacles in the water

questions.explanation_ar: descends تعني ينزل أو يهبط، أي الحركة نحو الأسفل إلى مستوى أو عمق أقل.

questions.question_text: Dr. Al-Rashid uses her underwater camera to 'capture' footage of the coral reef ecosystem. What does 'capture' mean?

options.text: To physically collect and bring marine animals to the surface
To record or photograph something to preserve it as a visual record
To destroy and remove harmful organisms from the reef area
To purchase expensive scientific equipment for research purposes

questions.explanation_ar: capture تعني يلتقط أو يُسجّل، أي تثبيت صورة أو لحظة بالتصوير أو التسجيل للاحتفاظ بها كسجل مرئي.

questions.question_text: Young scientists are 'tackling' the challenge of coral reef conservation with new technology. What does 'tackling' mean?

options.text: Studying a problem from a distance without taking direct action
Reporting a problem to authorities and waiting for their response
Actively working to deal with and find solutions to a problem
Avoiding a problem completely until better resources are available

questions.explanation_ar: tackling تعني يتصدى لـ ويواجه، أي العمل بنشاط لمعالجة تحدٍّ أو مشكلة ما بدلاً من تجنّبها.

questions.question_text: 'Implementing' a new conservation plan means the plan is still being discussed and has not yet been put into action.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. implementing تعني ينفّذ ويضع موضع التطبيق، أي أن الخطة أصبحت فعلاً قيد التنفيذ وليست مجرد نقاشات.

questions.question_text: When a country has 'invested' in young scientists, it has provided them with financial support and resources to develop their skills.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. invested تعني استثمر، أي توفير الدعم المالي والموارد اللازمة بهدف تحقيق نتائج مستقبلية مفيدة.

questions.question_text: The university has _____ millions of dollars in coral reef research over the past ten years.
questions.explanation_ar: invested تعني استثمر، وتُستخدم للتعبير عن تخصيص موارد مالية أو جهود كبيرة لتحقيق هدف طويل الأمد.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the present perfect continuous correctly to describe an ongoing irritating situation?

options.text: Boats have been damaging the reef constantly, and scientists are very concerned.
Boats have damaged the reef constantly since always now.
Boats been damaging the reef and this is a problem.
Boats have been damage the reef for a long time now.

questions.explanation_ar: يُستخدم المضارع التام المستمر لوصف حالة مزعجة أو مستمرة تُثير القلق، كما في الخيار a. الخيارات الأخرى تحتوي على أخطاء في التركيب.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the present perfect continuous to describe a recently completed action with visible evidence?

options.text: You look sunburned — have you been diving without sun protection today?
The scientist has studied coral genetics and published a paper.
The divers will have been working when the storm arrives.
They studied the reef in 2022 and found new species.

questions.explanation_ar: يُستخدم المضارع التام المستمر للتساؤل عن سبب نتيجة مرئية حاضرة (أثر الشمس) من نشاط جرى مؤخراً، كما في الخيار a.

questions.question_text: Choose the sentence that correctly uses the present perfect continuous in a passive meaning.

options.text: The reef has been damaged by pollution for many years.
The reef has been damaging by pollution for many years.
The reef is being damaged by pollution since last year.
The reef was being damaged by pollution for many years.

questions.explanation_ar: الشكل المبني للمجهول للمضارع التام المستمر هو: have/has been + تصريف ثالث. الخيار a صحيح، بينما تخطئ البقية في الصيغة أو حرف الجر.

questions.question_text: Which option correctly completes: 'The algae _____ disappearing from the reef since water temperatures started rising'?

options.text: has been
have
was
is being

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم has been مع 'algae' (المفرد في المعنى هنا) في المضارع التام المستمر، يليه الفعل بصيغة -ing مع since للإشارة إلى نقطة البداية.

questions.question_text: 'Pollution levels have been increasing in coastal waters — that explains why so many fish have left the reef' uses present perfect continuous correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. have been increasing يُفسّر النتيجة الحاضرة (هروب الأسماك) من خلال نشاط مستمر بدأ في الماضي، وهو استخدام صحيح للمضارع التام المستمر.

questions.question_text: Match each verb to its correct present perfect continuous form.
questions.explanation_ar: تُكوَّن صيغة المضارع التام المستمر بإضافة been بين has/have والفعل الرئيسي مضافاً إليه ing. dive→diving، grow→growing، bleach→bleaching، monitor→monitoring.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, what percentage of coral cover have some areas of the Great Barrier Reef lost?

options.text: Up to 25%
Up to 50%
Up to 70%
Up to 90%

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن بعض مناطق الحاجز المرجاني العظيم فقدت ما يصل إلى 50% من غطائها المرجاني خلال أحداث التبييض الجماعية الأخيرة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, what proportion of the world's coral reefs could disappear within three decades if current trends continue?

options.text: Up to 30%
Up to 50%
Up to 70%
Up to 90%

questions.explanation_ar: قدّر العلماء وفق ما ذكر النص أن ما يصل إلى 70% من شعاب مرجان العالم قد تختفي خلال ثلاثة عقود إذا استمرت الاتجاهات الحالية.

questions.question_text: What does Passage A suggest about the economic role of coral reefs by mentioning tourism and reef fisheries?

options.text: Reef tourism causes more harm than economic benefit to local communities
Coral reefs play a critical role in supporting both tourism income and human livelihoods
Reef fisheries have been completely replaced by modern aquaculture farms
The economic value of coral reefs is too small to influence conservation decisions

questions.explanation_ar: يُضمّن النص أن الشعاب المرجانية تمتلك قيمة اقتصادية ضخمة عبر السياحة التي تُدرّ مليارات سنوياً وصناعات الصيد التي تدعم معيشة الملايين.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, coral reefs protect coastlines by absorbing wave energy during storms, reducing damage to shorelines.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. ذكر النص صراحةً أن الشعاب المرجانية توفر حماية ساحلية عن طريق امتصاص طاقة الأمواج خلال العواصف، مما يقلل الأضرار التي تلحق بالشواطئ والمستوطنات البشرية.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, some areas of the Great Barrier Reef have lost up to _____ percent of their coral cover.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن بعض مناطق الحاجز المرجاني العظيم فقدت ما يصل إلى 50% من غطائها المرجاني جراء أحداث التبييض الجماعية.

questions.question_text: Match each conservation tool or strategy from Passage B to what it is used for.

right_items: monitoring reef health across large areas quickly
recording footage and documenting reef conditions
processing water samples on-site for immediate results
sharing research findings with a global scientific audience

correct_answer.right: recording footage and documenting reef conditions
monitoring reef health across large areas quickly
processing water samples on-site for immediate results
sharing research findings with a global scientific audience

questions.explanation_ar: وردت هذه الأدوات والاستراتيجيات في النص مع وظائفها: الكاميرا للتوثيق، الطائرات المسيّرة لرصد المناطق الواسعة، المختبر المتنقل للتحليل الفوري، والمؤتمرات لمشاركة النتائج عالمياً.
